sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَعُدِ النَّجَاحُ فِي بِيئَةِ الْعَمَلِ الْحَدِيثَةِ يَعْتَمِدُ فَقَطْ عَلَى الْمَهَارَاتِ الْفَنِّيَّةِ الْفَرْدِيَّةِ، بَلْ عَلَى الْقُدْرَةِ عَلَى الِانْدِمَاجِ ضِمْنَ فَرِيقٍ.
sentences.translation: Uspjeh u modernom radnom okruženju više ne zavisi isključivo o individualnim tehničkim vještinama, već o sposobnosti integracije u tim.
sentences.translationEn: Success in the modern workplace is no longer solely dependent on individual technical skills but also on the ability to integrate into a team.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الِاحْتِرَامُ الْمُتَبَادَلُ وَالتَّوَاصُلُ الْفَعَّالُ الرُّكْنَيْنِ الْأَسَاسِيَّيْنِ اللَّذَيْنِ تُبْنَى عَلَيْهِمَا ثَقَافَةٌ مُؤَسَّسِيَّةٌ صِحِّيَّةٌ وَمُنْتِجَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Uzajamno poštovanje i efikasna komunikacija smatraju se dva osnovna stuba na kojima se gradi zdrava i produktivna institucionalna kultura.
sentences.translationEn: Mutual respect and effective communication are the two cornerstones upon which a healthy and productive institutional culture is built.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا تُوَزَّعُ الْمَهَامُ بِنَاءً عَلَى الْكَفَاءَاتِ الْفَرْدِيَّةِ، تَتَحَقَّقُ الْأَهْدَافُ الْجَمَاعِيَّةُ بِفَعَالِيَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ وَسُرْعَةٍ قِيَاسِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kada se zadaci raspoređuju na osnovu individualnih kompetencija, kolektivni ciljevi se ostvaruju s visokom efikasnošću i rekordnom brzinom.
sentences.translationEn: When tasks are distributed based on individual competencies, collective goals are achieved with high efficiency and record speed.

sentences.arabic: وَعَلَاوَةً عَلَى ذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّ الِالْتِزَامَ بِأَخْلَاقِيَّاتِ الْمِهْنَةِ يُعَزِّزُ سُمْعَةَ الشَّرِكَةِ وَيَبْنِي ثِقَةً طَوِيلَةَ الْأَمَدِ مَعَ الْعُمَلَاءِ وَالشُّرَكَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Štaviše, pridržavanje profesionalne etike jača ugled kompanije i gradi dugoročno povjerenje s klijentima i partnerima.
sentences.translationEn: Furthermore, adhering to professional ethics enhances the company's reputation and builds long-term trust with clients and partners.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَى كُلِّ مُوَظَّفٍ أَنْ يُدْرِكَ أَنَّ نُمُوَّهُ الْمِهْنِيَّ مُرْتَبِطٌ ارْتِبَاطًا وَثِيقًا بِمَدَى تَعَاوُنِهِ وَمُسَاهَمَتِهِ فِي نَجَاحِ الْمَجْمُوعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga, svaki zaposlenik mora shvatiti da je njegov profesionalni rast usko povezan s nivoom njegove saradnje i doprinosa uspjehu grupe.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, every employee must realize that their professional growth is closely linked to the extent of their cooperation and contribution to the group's success.
